subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the fourth of the Fast, 1339, hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بتاریخ چهارم صیام ۳۳۹ مورخ بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
